description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking light blue exterior accented by black detailing. The car features an aggressive front fascia with sharp, angular air intakes and a sculpted hood, enhancing its sporty appearance. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels and low-profile tires suggest superior handling and speed. The rear is dominated by a prominent black rear wing spoiler and distinctive taillights, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The side profile reveals deep air vents and a streamlined silhouette, while the cockpit is enclosed by a dark, tinted windshield and windows. The overall design is modern and purposeful, built for both aesthetics and high-speed urban driving.
description: A light blue, low-profile sports car with black accents, large alloy wheels, and a prominent rear spoiler. Its aggressive styling and aerodynamic features highlight its high-performance nature.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the sharp front air intakes, sculpted hood, and large wheels.
description_view_1: Front-side angle emphasizing the angular headlights, side air vents, and sleek body lines.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the large rear spoiler, taillights, and rear air vents.
description_view_3: Rear-side angle focusing on the spoiler, rear fenders, and the curvature of the rear bodywork.
